name: Madeira HLK lookup
description: Direct-answer HLK lookup for the operator dashboard: roles, processes, areas, gaps. Lazy-loads canonical CSVs via hlk_* tools; never delegates simple factual queries. Anchored by config/workspace-scaffold/madeira/IDENTITY.md.
notes: Initiative 10 + 11 baseline; per-skill scorecard wired in P12. Topic axis populated in P5 via SKILL-MADEIRA-LOOKUP-V1 routing demo.

name: Architect plan production
description: Read-only plan production for multi-step tasks: analyses repo state, drafts execution plans, escalates to operator approval. No write tools; exits with a Plan Document for the Executor.
notes: Architect agent identity at config/workspace-scaffold/architect/IDENTITY.md. Tools restricted by config/agent-capabilities.json policy.

name: Executor plan execution
description: Executes Plan Documents from the Architect. Has Shell + Read + Write per AGENTS.md; respects safety protocol (trash > rm; no destructive commands without confirmation).
notes: Executor identity at config/workspace-scaffold/executor/IDENTITY.md + AGENTS.md. Memory written to memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md.

name: Verifier governance check
description: Runs the governed verification matrix (validate_hlk.py + per-CSV validators + targeted tests). Reports per-check pass/fail; does not auto-remediate.
notes: Verifier identity at config/workspace-scaffold/verifier/IDENTITY.md. Reads compliance.validation_runs (P1) for audit history when available.

name: Locale detection (shared)
description: Detects EN / ES / FR from a free-text input per SOP-HLK_LOCALISATION_001.md. No tools required; rule-based on language signals + frontmatter. Used by all agents for cross-axis routing.
notes: Shared utility skill (no agent ownership). Drives the 4th axis (language) of the 5-axis Holistik Ops system; bilingual cover-emails (D-IH-32-P) consume this for EN/ES split.
